Resume Books Infosessions Career Fair Contact Us Events Calendar Upcoming Events Past Events Service Junior EECS Day Maker Workshops EECS Day Bearhacks Cal Day Workshops Alumni Contact Information Contact Information Photo Gallery Yearbooks Slideshows Current Officers Current Committee Members example: CS 61a, ee 20, cs 188 example: Hilfinger, hilf*, cs 61a Sign up for a Department tour! Tours are offered weekly in the Fall and Spring semesters, and occasionally throughout Summer, and will be up to 1 hour long. In the "Additional Comments" section, please provide the following information: Availability. Due to school schedule we cannot guarantee the time adjustment, but we will do our best! Preference for virtual or in-person tour Tour Emphasis (Select any): Getting to know the department physically Personal Experience Educational recommendations (classes, workload, academic emphasis, research, etc) General recommendations (living, commute, social life, clubs, community) Hearing about faculty Getting to know other prospective students and maybe some more Tell us a bit about yourself - Where you from,

Emphasis (Select any): Getting to know the department physically Personal Experience Educational recommendations (classes, workload, academic emphasis, research, etc) General recommendations (living, commute, social life, clubs, community) Hearing about faculty Getting to know other prospective students and maybe some more Tell us a bit about yourself - Where you from, academic status (HS Student, CC students, other), are you planning to apply to Cal/already applied/got accepted/other, etc. Number of Tour Guests - Do you plan on bringing guests to the tour? Parents are welcome and encouraged to join, you can also bring a friend with you! Tour agenda: 20-30 minutes virtual tour. 15-30 minutes of Q&A - bring all questions you have! 15-30 minutes tour members interacting with each other Please allow three days for confirmation. Note: Tour requests made less than 48 hours in advance from the requested time cannot be guaranteed. Name Contact email address Re-type email Contact phone number Additional comments: denotes a required field Excited about EECS at UC Berkeley? Visit our online store at hkn.mu/shop !
